title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your account preferences, security, and notification settings.

profile.referDesc: Share your referral link. Earn rewards when friends sign up.

roi.title: Business ROI Settings
roi.subtitle: Customize how your savings are calculated
roi.info: This value is used to calculate your 'Money Saved' on the Overview page. It should represent the average hourly wage or cost of a human support agent.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.subtitle: Irreversible actions
dangerZone.deleteDesc: Permanently delete your account, chatbots, training data, and all records. This cannot be undone.
confirmList: All your AI chatbots and their configurations
All chat history and conversation logs
All knowledge base sources and training data
All billing records and payment history
Your account from all systems (including Clerk)
dangerZone.confirmPhraseWarn: To confirm, type "{{phrase}}" in the box below
dangerZone.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

security.title: Security & Data Management
security.subtitle: Manage your account security, authentication methods, and personal data settings.
security.privacyDesc: We encrypt all your data at rest and in transit. REMOVED AI employees cannot access your private knowledge base sources or chatbot conversation logs without your explicit permission.

authCard.title: Authentication
authCard.passwordDesc: Manage your password and security questions.
authCard.twoFactorDesc: Add an extra layer of security to your account.
authCard.redirectNote: You will be redirected to our secure identity manager to update your credentials.

exportCard.title: Data Export
exportCard.description: Download all your chatbot data, knowledge bases, and configurations in a single JSON file.

retentionCard.title: Data Retention
retentionCard.subtitle: Choose how long you want to store your chatbot conversation logs and visitor data.
retentionCard.notice: Changing this setting will apply to all existing and future logs. Deleted logs cannot be recovered.

30.label: 30 Days
30.desc: Logs are automatically deleted after a month.

90.label: 90 Days
90.desc: Keep history for a full quarter.

365.label: 1 Year
365.desc: Logs are kept for a year before removal.

forever.label: Indefinite
forever.desc: No logs are ever automatically deleted.

dataExport.title: Data Portability
dataExport.subtitle: Export a comprehensive report of your personal data, chatbot configurations, and account logs.
dataExport.notice: Notice: Data exports can be requested once every 72 hours for security and resource management.
dataExport.reportDesc: Professional summary and raw data sent via email.
dataExport.cooldownDesc: You have already requested an export recently. You can request your next data export in {{remaining}}.
dataExport.infoDesc: Your data will be compiled into a secure PDF and JSON file and sent directly to your registered email address within minutes.
dataExport.success: Data export request received. Check your email!

notifications.title: Notification Preferences

usage.title: Usage Alerts
usage.desc: Stay informed about your message quota and usage limits.

billing.title: Billing & Subscription
billing.desc: Manage notifications for invoices, payments, and plan changes.

security.title: Security & Account
security.desc: Keep your account safe with critical security notifications.

product.title: Product Updates
product.desc: Be the first to know about new features and improvements.

usage_alerts_email.label: Email Notifications
usage_alerts_email.desc: Receive alerts when you reach 80% and 100% of your limit.

usage_alerts_app.label: In-App Alerts
usage_alerts_app.desc: Real-time dashboard notifications for usage warnings.

billing_email.label: Email Invoices
billing_email.desc: Monthly invoices sent directly to your inbox.

billing_app.label: Payment Alerts
billing_app.desc: In-app notifications for successful or failed payments.

security_email.label: Login Alerts
security_email.desc: Notifications for new logins from unrecognized devices.

security_app.label: Security Updates
security_app.desc: Alerts for password changes and security settings.

product_email.label: Newsletters
product_email.desc: Weekly roundup of new AI features and platform tips.

product_app.label: What's New
product_app.desc: Visual indicators for major product updates.

notifications.infoBox: Critical system notifications (like password resets) cannot be disabled. Some email notifications may take up to 24 hours to reflect changes.

referrals.title: Referrals & Rewards
referrals.subtitle: Share REMOVED AI with your friends and earn bonus credits.

history.title: Referral History
history.subtitle: Detailed logs of all your referred friends and rewards.
history.empty: No referrals found yet. Share your link to start earning!

affiliate.title: Earn Cash with the REMOVED Affiliate Program
affiliate.desc: Soon you will be able to earn real commission for every paying customer you bring to REMOVED AI. Stay tuned for our professional affiliate dashboard and higher reward tiers.
